divergent_child.mechanism: Different mechanism from liquidity stress: allocate among TLT/GLD/XLU/risk ETFs using medium-horizon realized carry and downside-volatility surprise rather than range/volume stress breadth.
divergent_child.title: ETF defensive carry surprise allocator using rate-sensitive ETF carry/roll proxies

bad_result_policy.note: If rejected, no refinement/extension/direct inversion is suggested.

costs_slippage.handling: qfa backtest has no transaction-cost parameter; post-cost proxy subtracts 5 bps times estimated one-way daily target-weight turnover.

data_source: Alpaca real OHLCV via qfa/AlpacaGateway; --data-csv not used

db_used.retention_note: temporary SQLite DB, wal, and shm files deleted after each qfa JSON capture

decision_rationale: Rejected: although worst random-window max drawdown improved slightly versus AR-043 (-0.1567204 vs -0.1583319), primary post-cost Sharpe fell to 0.27230672 vs AR-043 0.45490526, random p25 Sharpe worsened to -0.31652669 vs AR-043 -0.1024685, and available orthogonality failed with AR-043 correlation 0.90453842. AR-008/AR-037/AR-039 correlations were unavailable because their latest.json files do not retain equity curves.

orthogonality.method: Pearson correlation of daily qfa equity returns from retained latest.json curves where available; AR-043 also re-run same primary window for comparison metrics.

parent_ar043_comparison.method: same qfa real-data windows with same 5 bps turnover-cost proxy

sanitized_command_prose: qfa backtest run was called with model path, ETF symbols, dates, timeframe 1Day, initial cash 100000, and a temporary SQLite --db path; credential export/source snippets omitted; --data-csv was not used.
